*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Left heel / Measures 2.1 cm x 2.2 cm / Stage: Stage 2
Drainage present - serous, light. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Wound note - Leftheel. Meas 2.1x2.2x0.4cm. Light serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 53% gran, 47% slough. Periwound erythematous. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Espinoza notified.
